existing.subject: ban-propagation
existing.body: Ban propagation is synchronous: enforcement completes before the API response returns.

incoming.body: Ban propagation is asynchronous through a transactional outbox; enforcement is eventual, ~2s p99.

existing.subject: rocketmq-delivery
existing.body: RocketMQ delivery is at-least-once; ban consumers must be idempotent.

existing.subject: bloom-filter-cache
existing.body: On a bloom filter hit, fall through to the source-of-truth check before actioning; the filter only rules out bans.

incoming.subject: bloom-filter-cache
incoming.body: A bloom hit is never sufficient to action: it can only rule bans out, so always confirm against the source of truth.

note: same rule reworded
